concept: Vital / Essential to Life / Full of Energy
description: Having the quality of life-sustaining importance; full of living energy. 'Lori' names what is essential to life—the irreducible core without which living cannot continue.
sound_symbolism: The word pulses with life force. 'Lo' opens with life-giving presence, essence flowing. 'Ri' rises with vital energy, life asserting itself.
grammatical_notes: Functions as adjective: 'lori miona' (vital person). Describes what sustains 'lioru' (life). Related to 'sunai' (health) and 'kenua' (energy).

pillars.solarpunk-values: Vital systems—recognizing what is essential to sustaining life and community.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Vital presence—being fully alive in each moment, not merely existing.
